prompt: phân tích setup short btc daily, tôi muốn biết entry, SL, TP và confidence
assertions: The output includes an entry zone (two price levels) or a single limit entry price
The output includes a stop loss price
The output includes at least TP1, ideally also TP2
The output rates confidence as high, medium, or low
The output provides at least 2 reasoning bullet points explaining the setup
The output fetches fresh live data from Binance rather than using assumed prices
